title: Seven full tone notes with five varied notes and three octaves. Their positions on the key board of a harmonium and uses in notations and music
Importance and proper uses of laya and talls. One dozen rhythms with examples for vocal music and various speeds of singing and playing on slow normal and fast tempoes
